name: whisper-telegram-mcp
description: Transcribe Telegram voice messages using Whisper -- supports local (faster-whisper) and OpenAI API backends
author: Abid Mahdi

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe a local audio file (OGG, WAV, MP3, etc.) using Whisper

tools.name: transcribe_telegram_voice
tools.description: Download and transcribe a Telegram voice message by file_id

tools.name: speak_text
tools.description: Synthesise speech from text and save as OGG voice note (Kokoro → OpenAI TTS → macOS say)

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available Whisper model sizes and characteristics

tools.name: check_backends
tools.description: Check which transcription backends (local/OpenAI) are available
